violations.text: Cheese and Cheese/Prosciutto filled buns, and Cheese Danishes were observed held on the counter at room temperature. Per the PIC, items were baked fresh recently prior to inspection and only held out for 4 hrs. PIC was instructed due to ingredients (cheeses and prosciutto) items must be kept refrigerated until application for use of time is submitted and granted. Items were moved to refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

A splash guard is to be added to the sink (to be used as a mop sink) in the backroom area located directly next to the prep table to prevent possible splash/contamination during times of use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026

At the time of inspection, the following areas of the Physical Facilities were observed in need of sealing to allow for materials to be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, easily cleanable... - The front counter exposed wood structure/framing is to be sealed - The wall above the oven (old hood vent unit area) in the back with exposed sheetrock/wallboard is to be covered/sealed - The exposed wood below the shelf at the 3-bay sink is to be sealed New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026
